query: SELECT ct.id, ct.titulo, ct.dataVencimento, ct.createdAt, (SELECT MAX(t.slaApuracaoDias) FROM credit_task_teses ctt JOIN teses t ON ctt.teseId = t.id WHERE ctt.taskId = ct.id) as maxSla FROM credit_tasks ct WHERE ct.fila = 'apuracao' LIMIT 5
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 49151bcmSzJvACt.c1decb00aa64 --database i9dRshPFnDefFw9MJLeLri --execute SELECT ct.id, ct.titulo, ct.dataVencimento, ct.createdAt, (SELECT MAX(t.slaApuracaoDias) FROM credit_task_teses ctt JOIN teses t ON ctt.teseId = t.id WHERE ctt.taskId = ct.id) as maxSla FROM credit_tasks ct WHERE ct.fila = 'apuracao' LIMIT 5
